_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Urethral Dilatation - Non endoscopic as an independent procedure
clinical_indications: Occasionally dilatation is done prior to the passage of a large instrument such as a lithotrite or resectoscope through the urethra.

preauth.label: Detailed Clinical notes with history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings and advice for admission
Discharge Summary of last Urethroplasty performed (not required)

claim.label: Detailed clinical notes of the current visit (not required)
Post procedure USG/ Uroflowmetry report (not required)
Detailed procedure / operative notes detailing size of dilators used

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, planned line of treatment, indication for procedure submitted?
Did the Anterograde urethrography/ Retrograde urethrography (RGU) / Micturating cystourethrography (MCU) Investigation reports submitted?
Was Discharge Summary of last Urethroplasty performed submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details available?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes submitted?
Are the detailed procedure / operative notes detailing size of dilators used?
Are the detailed clinical notes of the current visit submitted?
Post procedure USG/ Uroflowmetry report submitted?

common_queries: Anterograde urethrography/Retrograde urethrography (RGU)/Micturating cystourethrography (MCU) report not indicative of Urethral Dilatation procedure
Detailed Clinical notes with history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings and advice for admission not provided at pre-authorization
Anterograde urethrography/Retrograde urethrography (RGU)/Micturating cystourethrography (MCU) reports not submitted at pre-authorization
Detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) not provided at claim submission
Detailed procedure / operative notes detailing size of dilators used not submitted at claim submission
Detailed discharge summary not submitted at claim submission

clinical_key_pointers: Urethral dilation is a process where the urethra or the meatus (external opening) are stretched under local or general anesthetic.
surgical_options: Urethral dilation: Non-Endoscopic procedure & Endoscopic procedure.
